topics: Isolation techniques. Comparison and performance evaluation of bipolar and MOS technology. Fabrication process of MOS devices: NMOS and PMOS IC technology
scaling factors for device parameters. Analogy of MOSFET capacitance. MOS inverters: Basic circuit of NMOS inverter-voltage transfer characteristics
inverters with n- type MOSFET load. CMOS inverter - voltage transfer characteristics
Circuit operation of NMOS NOR & NAND gates
compound circuits using CMOS logic. Basic circuit concepts: sheet resistance
inverter delays - driving large capacitive loads
Layout design rules for MOS circuits - Lamda based rules
NAND and NOR. Review of power dissipation in CMOS Circuits: Sources of power dissipation- static
dynamic and leakage power dissipation. Dynamic power reduction techniques - Supply voltage scaling approaches-parallelism
